data.title: New Kroger CEO brings experience from Walmart and airline industry
data.description: Greg Foran replaces Ron Sargent, who served as Kroger's interim CEO since March 2025.

data.title: Google expands AI Mode's role in ecommerce tools
data.description: Google is also advancing what it calls “agentic commerce,” in which AI systems assist with or complete transactions on behalf of users.

data.title: FedEx bets on AI and data to drive $98 billion revenue by 2029
data.description: CEO Raj Subramaniam said during the company's 2026 Investor Day that FedEx is building “the most flexible, efficient, and intelligent network in history,” anchored by digital insight layered on top of its global physical infrastructure.

data.title: US Foods adds AI ordering tools to as digital commerce drives growth
data.description: US Foods is also pairing those customer-facing tools with logistics technology aimed at improving delivery efficiency.

data.title: Albertsons, Target, Williams-Sonoma sign up to test new ChatGPT ads
data.description: ChatGPT's new ads are currently being tested alongside organic responses to prompts on OpenAI's platform.
